caption: A stylized graphic animation features a central circular emblem with a red background, depicting a silhouette of a person wearing a mask and a textured garment, holding an object that resembles a weapon. This emblem is surrounded by a swarm of white, hexagonal cells that shift and expand across a dark purple background. Initially, the hexagons are concentrated in a loose cluster around the red circle, with some appearing fragmented or dissolved at the edges. As time progresses, the white hexagonal pattern grows and spreads outward, eventually filling a significant portion of the screen and creating a denser, more structured network of cells that partially envelops the central figure. The red circular logo remains stationary and consistent throughout the sequence while the surrounding geometric patterns evolve and multiply.
